name: github-pr-review-triage
description: GitHub PR review triage via gh: fetch threads, fix, commit, reply, and resolve. Use for Copilot or Bugbot inline feedback or closing review threads.

inputs.name: repository
inputs.description: GitHub repository as owner/name (for example agents-repo/registry).

inputs.name: push-permission
inputs.description: Whether commit and push are explicitly allowed for this pass.

outputs.name: triage-table
outputs.description: Markdown table of threads with path, line, author, outcome, and rationale.

outputs.name: handoff-summary
outputs.description: Summary with PR URL, commit SHA, threads resolved count, and notes.
